text: The high velocity fog tip used with the all-purpose firefighting nozzle should always be:

options.text: A) Stowed separately in a clip or rack at each fire station
B) Attached to the all-purpose nozzle by a chain
C) Coated with heavy grease to prevent corrosion
D) Painted red to be identified as emergency equipment

explanation: The high-velocity fog tip is attached by a chain to ensure it remains readily available at the fire station for immediate changeover, preventing loss during the urgency of firefighting.
